creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
Created attachment 181487
Update to 2.000018

Update devel/p5-local-lib from version 2.000015 to 2.000018

Capture::Tiny is used for extended tests and not used for tests from t/ started by 'make test' - remove it from TEST_DEPENDS

Changelog: http://search.cpan.org/dist/local-lib/Changes

portlint: looks fine.
Tested using 'poudriere testport' on FreeBSD 10.3 and 11.0.
Tested using 'make test' on FreeBSD 11.0/amd64 with perl 5.2[024].
